coverage_scope: Use PASS-quality local OHLCV symbols only; start with top audited subset before full universe.
chunking_rule: Stage by symbols and months; each chunk must be independently hashable and resumable.
pit_requirement: Every row requires feature_visible_at, feature_usable_from, source_cutoff_time.
missingness_requirement: Every missing value requires explicit missing_reason; no future fill.
audit_requirement: Coverage audit must report symbols, months, rows, missing rates, and hash counts.
notes: Do not jump directly to all 2726 local files without staged audit.

coverage_scope: Monthly feature dates at local month-end trading dates up to train_cutoff context.
chunking_rule: Use date_group=YYYY-MM and one feature_date per date_group.
pit_requirement: feature_usable_from must be after market close and before any label use.
missingness_requirement: Rows missing month-end data get missing_reason=missing_input or not_in_pit_universe.
audit_requirement: Audit must verify no post-cutoff training rows are marked train-ready.
notes: Date grid design only; no rows generated now.

coverage_scope: Use the existing six CP-06 formula strings only.
chunking_rule: No new formulas; no sweep expansion in this loop.
pit_requirement: Formula operators must use only historical windows ending at feature_date.
missingness_requirement: Operator missingness must be deterministic and versioned.
audit_requirement: Audit must verify formula_hash and feature_hash for every formula/date/symbol row.
notes: No formula generation or formula evaluation.

coverage_scope: Feature hash per formula contract; feature row hash per symbol/date/value row.
chunking_rule: Chunk manifest must include chunk_id, row_count, input file hash summary, and output hash summary.
pit_requirement: PIT contract version must be included in feature_hash.
missingness_requirement: Missingness policy version must be included in feature_hash.
audit_requirement: Audit must fail if reserved feature_hash remains.

coverage_scope: Broader materialization must pass audit before CP-08 readiness changes.
chunking_rule: No merge until coverage audit passes.
pit_requirement: PIT PASS required for every non-missing row.
missingness_requirement: Missingness WARN/BLOCK thresholds must be defined before merge readiness.
audit_requirement: Audit must decide PASS_SAMPLE_BROADER_NOT_TRAINING_READY or BLOCK.
notes: Even a broader sample does not automatically allow training.

coverage_scope: Stop if row count explodes, missingness is high, PIT fields fail, or hash duplicates appear.
chunking_rule: Prefer multiple small commits over one huge output file.
pit_requirement: Any PIT failure blocks merge readiness.
missingness_requirement: High missingness or duplicate feature_hash/row_hash blocks readiness.
audit_requirement: Audit must record blocker reason without training.
notes: Defines fail-closed execution guard for future loop.

coverage_scope: Broader staged materialization plan only; no feature values generated now.
chunking_rule: 50 symbols x 24 monthly dates x 6 formulas as first broader sample.
pit_requirement: PIT fields required on every future row.
missingness_requirement: Explicit missing_reason required on every missing row.
audit_requirement: Broader audit required before merge/training gate refresh.
notes: Next loop may implement bounded stage 1 only if safety gates remain satisfied.
